name: Arc
description: Innovative web browser from The Browser Company with vertical tabs, spaces, and modern design

version_check.fallback: Check HTTP Last-Modified header on https://releases.arc.net/release/Arc-latest.dmg or scrape https://arc.net/blog for release announcements
version_check.notes: URL requires app bundle inspection to determine

release_date.field: Scrape blog post date from https://arc.net/blog or use HTTP Last-Modified of download URL

notes: Developed by The Browser Company. Sparkle appcast URL is behind authentication/Cloudflare protection and not publicly accessible. Version and release date must be inferred from download metadata or blog scraping. Arc also has a Windows version (not covered by this profile).
